animations.scrollReveal: Fade-in and slide-up using Framer Motion, with staggering for grid items.
animations.mouseSpotlight: Interactive radial gradient tracking mouse position on tech stack and project cards.
animations.particles: Floating soft particles in the background using tsparticles.
animations.customCursor: Custom circular cursor following mouse pointer, growing in size over clickable elements.

layout.spacing: Generous paddings (p-12 to p-24 for sections).
layout.navbar: Floating pill-shaped glassmorphism nav fixed at the top.
layout.grid: Bento-style asymmetric grid for tech stack and projects.

components.buttons: Pill shaped, subtle glow on hover, mix of primary gradient buttons and glass outline buttons.
components.cards: Glassmorphism panels, 1px subtle borders, nested border radii, no muddy shadows.

abstract_bg.description: Abstract purple and blue gradient orbs on dark background

project_ai.description: AI Emotion Detection neural network thumbnail

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React app focusing on the portfolio landing page and dedicated projects route.
Implement the dark/light mode toggle saving preference in localStorage.
Use Framer Motion extensively for staggered reveals, page transitions, and the custom cursor.
Implement a Mouse Spotlight effect on cards: A radial gradient that follows the mouse cursor position on hover.
Add floating particles in the background using react-tsparticles.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements: buttons, links, toggles, form inputs.
Keep typography tight and sharp: Cabinet Grotesk for headings, Geist for body, JetBrains Mono for badges and code snippets.
Create the floating glass pill navbar with segmented active states.
